name: Zenith National Insurance Corp.
description: Zenith National Insurance Corp. is a prominent American insurance company headquartered in Woodland Hills, California, specializing primarily in workers' compensation insurance. As an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited, the company operates as a holding entity for Zenith Insurance Company and its subsidiaries, including ZNAT Insurance Company. With a long-standing reputation in the insurance industry, Zenith focuses on providing specialized coverage and services to businesses, leveraging its expertise to manage workplace risks effectively while maintaining a strong commitment to its policyholders and the broader insurance market.
